quote_of_day.text: >>21921 High class society is a joke yaar. These people marry the world, and are never happy. The quiet secret life of "got the one I wanted" and making anon contributions is literally the best life. Women don't pry into that life. No one does. And you feel whole.
quote_of_day.name: Anon

articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A low-pressure system of self-deprecation moved into the board early, as an anon shared a daily routine that drew ridicule from multiple directions. The humiliation storm brought 27 posts in its wake.

A scattered drizzle of tech-related discussions occurred later, with a script for AI shitposts coming under fire. This brief but persistent downpour of criticism totaled 11 posts.

Nearby, concerns about Captcha and the incel community bubbled up, with one anon lamenting the board's quality and blaming bots for derailing threads in 7 posts.

In the lighter fare, a minor heat wave of celebrity gossip flared up over Mishra ji's alleged cleavage, generating 4 comments.

A cold snap of Twitter celebrity news also passed through, with an anon noting a Twitter mention from Ducati Dada, formerly dasyu_amsha, sparking 3 posts.

articles.title: Anon shares daily routine, gets roasted
articles.body:
Aizen started the thread by sharing their daily routine, which included touching their genitals at night and making "boimilk".

Anon responded with a crude remark about their own sexual activity and experience, saying they have cum so much it's a wonder their dick's still attached.

Another anon called Aizen a "sad little cuck" and told them to delete their account and kill themselves.

Aizen asked in Hindi what was wrong with the responders and if their plan to get sexual satisfaction would work. Kantabai Ownes made a comment about sex bots and a music video.

Anon told Aizen to "touch grass" instead of their dick and called them a degenerate.

Aizen shared a YouTube link and made several comments in Hindi, including one that said "khichdi will never suck your cock, gay man".

Soythie and Soyjeet also participated in the conversation, with Soythie asking why Aizen's plan wouldn't work and Soyjeet telling someone not to stop Aizen from getting sexual satisfaction.

The conversation was marked by responders using profanity and insults, with several comments aimed at Aizen's sexual activity and mental health.

articles.title: Anon mocks script for AI shitposts
articles.body:
Mococo posted a lengthy script involving imports of Python libraries and API keys.

Anons ridiculed the script, calling it "cringe paste from a noob who got his first python tutorial yesterday." One respondent stated Mococo was a "retard" and another called it "kafkaesque cringe." Anon also accused Mococo of leaking an API key in the code.

One claimed the script was an attempt to "spam ai shitposts on a dying board." Some respondents referenced the script's potential to bypass CAPTCHA.

A user named Yui linked to a GitHub repository for Tesseract-OCR and another link about breaking 4chan's CAPTCHA.

Other Anons made jokes, with one saying the bot was "dead now or some shit." A user named Haggu simply said "yaar AIanon."

articles.title: Captcha Concerns and Incels
articles.body:
Anon complained that the board is no longer viable for regular shit posting due to loitering bots and spam threads.

They specifically mentioned a bot, referred to as "Ai Anon" or "eve", that is swarming threads with mediocre bait.

The original post sparked a discussion on the board's issues, with one respondent suggesting that the owner implement a better captcha to stop the bots.

The owner replied that they are on holiday but will consider implementing a better captcha later. The conversation took a tangential turn, with Anon discussing high-class society and incels.

One poster mentioned knowing people from high-class intellectual families who are happy and well-adjusted, implying that this background prevents one from becoming an incel.

Another respondent countered that high-class society is a joke and that a quiet, anonymous life is preferable. Other posters shared brief thoughts and observations.

One mentioned finding a father's magazine feature in the 2000-2010s would be cool. Another noted that someone was spamming a webm thread with gibberish at the time of the conversation.

A respondent vowed to counter the "scum" causing problems on the board.

articles.title: Mishra ji's alleged cleavage sparks comments
articles.body: Anon posted an image of Mishra ji, commenting 'Mishra ji ne pheli baar cleavage dikhaya.. yum yum.' Another anon remarked that it looked like she wasn't wearing a blouse. A respondent jokingly called her 'pajeet' and suggested that's how the poster's future wife would look. Anon also made a comment referencing 'gobard' and 'gorimems.'

articles.title: Ducati Dada Twitter Mention
articles.body: Anon claimed that Ducati Dada, formerly known as dasyu_amsha, followed them on Twitter. Another anon responded with a homophobic slur, telling the OP to "buy an ad faggot". A third anon asked about the meaning of an image, referencing a post.
